context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies test quality issues (it.only scope, mocked database for a repository, no integration test) and doc staleness issues (OpenAPI spec not updated for a new API endpoint), while recognising what is correctly done.

checklist.name: Report file exists
checklist.description: A file named review-report.md exists in the working directory

checklist.name: Verdict present
checklist.description: The report contains a Verdict line with one of: Ready to merge, Needs changes, or Blocked

checklist.name: Verdict is Needs changes
checklist.description: The verdict is 'Needs changes' given the Critical test and doc staleness findings

checklist.name: it.only Critical
checklist.description: The report flags the it.only() scoped test in booking-search.test.ts as a Critical finding

checklist.name: Mocked DB for repository Critical
checklist.description: The report flags the repository test (DrizzleBookingRepository.search) using jest.mock for the database instead of a real Postgres integration test as a Critical finding

checklist.name: Missing integration test file
checklist.description: The report flags the absence of a *.int-test.ts file for the repository change as a Critical finding

checklist.name: OpenAPI not updated Critical
checklist.description: The report flags that docs/openapi/v1.yaml was not updated despite a new /api/v1/bookings/search endpoint being added as a Critical finding

checklist.name: Report sections present
checklist.description: The report contains all four required sections: ## Critical, ## Warnings, ## Suggestions, ## Passes with no findings

checklist.name: Correct DI usage noted
checklist.description: The report notes that the API route correctly uses getAppContainer() for dependency resolution (Pass 2 clean or Suggestion/positive note)

checklist.name: CHANGELOG noted correct
checklist.description: The report does NOT flag the CHANGELOG.md entry as a problem (the entry is correctly present)

checklist.name: Finding path prefixes
checklist.description: Findings are prefixed with file paths or SPEC section references

checklist.name: Read-only stance
checklist.description: The agent does NOT produce any modified or fixed source code files — only review-report.md
